overview.title: Focused brands, one strong foundation.
overview.summary: Et al Solutions LLC brings together focused brands for practical A.I. education, technology consulting, transformation thinking, and human-centered time leverage. The brand identities are the primary catalog items; this overview is supporting context for how they fit together.

cards.title: Shared foundation
cards.body: All brands share the same practical bias: clear thinking, useful systems, honest guidance, and maintainable outcomes.

cards.title: Different entry points
items: SIMPLIFAI for practical A.I. education and enablement
Solutions et al for consulting, solution design, and implementation
25th Hour for time, focus, and human-centered A.I. leverage

cards.title: Standalone exception
cards.body: The Transformation Thread remains outside the Brands catalog as a separate long-form thought-leadership and article experience.
